expected_state.ngap: The required milestone-1 NGAP subset is established with the real Open5GS core and registration can progress to UE context setup.

ngap_procedures.NG Setup: accepted by the declared AMF endpoint
ngap_procedures.Initial UE Message: reaches the declared Open5GS control-plane lane
ngap_procedures.Uplink NAS Transport: carries the registration request to the AMF
ngap_procedures.Downlink NAS Transport: returns registration progress toward the UE
ngap_procedures.UE Context Release: completes cleanly after success or rollback-safe cleanup

expected_state.release_state: UE context release is clean and auditable for retry or rollback decisions
expected_state.subscriber: sanitized-imsi-001 is accepted by the declared Open5GS profile.

observed_state.ngap: The required milestone-1 NGAP subset reached Downlink NAS Transport, where the real Open5GS core rejected registration.

ngap_procedures.Uplink NAS Transport: carried the registration request to the real core
ngap_procedures.Downlink NAS Transport: returned the registration rejection from the real Open5GS core

observed_state.release_state: UE context release completed and the lane returned to a rollback-safe idle state
observed_state.subscriber: The observed subscriber or profile was not accepted as declared.

procedures.name: NG Setup
procedures.detail: the declared AMF accepted NG setup before registration began

procedures.name: Initial UE Message
procedures.detail: the first UE-originated NAS message reached the NGAP-facing edge

procedures.name: Uplink NAS Transport
procedures.detail: uplink NAS transport carried the registration request to the real core

procedures.name: Downlink NAS Transport
procedures.detail: downlink NAS transport returned the registration rejection from the declared core profile

procedures.name: UE Context Release
procedures.detail: UE context release completed and the cleanup state is auditable

diff_summary: NGAP transport is reachable and the named Open5GS endpoint is explicit.
Registration does not progress past Downlink NAS Transport in the required NGAP subset.
The failure is procedural or profile-related rather than a total transport outage.
operator_next_step: Inspect the subscriber profile, PLMN/TAC/DNN assumptions, then decide whether to correct the request or roll back the lane.
